content:
烈日坠入大海，海滩上的欢腾声戛然而止——
水汽蒸腾间一道金黄的身影隐现，竟有点像一只刚出炉还冒着热气的“烤地瓜”。
“吵醒我睡觉的人，必须付出代价”，冷冽的枪口抵住守密人额头！这场海滩危机该如何化解？

🏝️特别活动「黑阳垂照的永夏」，将于9 月 1 日 9:00 - 9 月 15 日 9:00 开启！
🏝️为大家奉上活动奖励预览图：

——✦——✦—— ✦✦✦ ——✦——✦——

The scorching sun plunges beneath the waves, and the cheerful din of the beach ceases as if severed by a knife.
Through the shimmering veil of rising steam, a figure emerges, forged of gilded light. 
A cold gun barrel presses into your forehead. 
“Whoever dares to wake me,” she whispers, “let’s just say that’s a bill that comes due immediately.”
Oh no. How do you resolve this beachside crisis?

🏝️Special event "Summer under Black Sun" will be available from <t:1756688400:F> to <t:1757898000:F>
🏝️Check out the Event Rewards below:
thread_title: 特别活动「黑阳垂照的永夏」，奖励一览！Summer under Black Sun: Rewards Overview!
